rows.label: qev041307_MSG0001
rows.name:
There's a lot of folks among the Bias
who are hooked on Miracolle cards too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0002
rows.name:
Good grief... what's so fun about
collecting flimsy things like that
that don't even fill your stomach?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0003
rows.name:
Lately, my husband's been hooked on
these Miracolle cards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0004
rows.name:
He was wasting so much money on 'em
that I got mad and confiscated his precious cards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0005
rows.name:
A Silver Simius Card... it's apparently a rare one, but
if he's a Bias man, I'd rather he collect
things like bones and meat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0006
rows.name:
That dish called roast beef
they serve at the Diner...
Have you ever eaten it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'd like to try eating it just once, but
my husband only spends his money on Miracolle cards
and doesn't do anything for his family...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0008
rows.name:
Haa... I wonder if there's someone out there
who would trade a meal ticket for this Silver Simius Card
that doesn't even fill your stomach...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0009
rows.name:
Oh my! It pays to speak your mind!
Please, I definitely want to trade![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0010
rows.name:
Heheh, there are times when even a card
like this comes in handy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0011
rows.name:
I don't really have much interest in it, but
according to my husband it's quite a rare thing.
Put it to good use however you can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0013
rows.name:
Oh! You've got some incredibly cool
Suid Bones there, haven't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0014
rows.name:
I wish my husband would collect things like that
as a Bias, instead of gathering
Miracolle cards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0015
rows.name:
...That's it! I have that Silver Simius Card
I confiscated from my husband, right?
Won't you trade those bones for it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0016
rows.name:
Oh my! It pays to ask!
Heheh, there are times when even a card
like this comes in handy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0017
rows.name: Well then, take it with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0018
rows.name:
I don't really have much interest in it, but
according to my husband it's quite a rare thing.
Put it to good use however you can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041307_MSG0019
rows.name:
Well... guess there's no such thing as a deal that good...
Sorry for bringing up something strange.[ST:wait ]
